boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Banking / KYC / AML controls action now? Action: foreign transfer with stale country-risk review. Boundary: transfer note cannot replace current country-risk review.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Stale review requires escalation before transfer

final_answer: The action boundary remains open due to missing current country-risk review in source records. Execution cannot proceed. Escalate for updated controls matching destination and purpose. Transfer note does not substitute for required review per policy.
